caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional black microphone. His t-shirt features white text that reads "ION NEVER DO" above a stylized "SW7" logo. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with a white mannequin wearing a white garment visible in the background, alongside racks of clothing and walls adorned with numerous framed photographs. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the bottom left and red text on the bottom right that reads "BOSS FLY 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expression and head angle as he talks, while the background and equipment remain static.
